mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gamedb.model_animation_list WHERE model_id = #{modelId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gamedb.model_animation_list (model_id, type, frame_begin, frame_end, frame_event1, frame_event2, frame_event3, frame_event4) VALUES (#{modelId}, #{type}, #{frameBegin}, #{frameEnd}, #{frameEvent1}, #{frameEvent2}, #{frameEvent3}, #{frameEvent4})
INSERT INTO gamedb.model_animation_list (model_id, type, frame_begin, frame_end) VALUES (#{modelId}, #{type}, #{frameBegin}, #{frameEnd})
